title: Grilled Bok Choi Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy wrap filled with grilled bok choi, charred Malaysian chicken, and smoky sauce.

ingredients.name: Malaysian chicken breast
ingredients.notes: marinated in soy sauce and lime juice

ingredients.name: grilled
ingredients.notes: used for chicken and bok choi

instructions: Marinate chicken in soy sauce and lime juice for at least 30 minutes.
Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Brush bok choi with oil and grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble wraps by slicing grilled chicken and bok choi, and spreading smoky sauce on the tortilla.
Add char to taste, if desired.
